calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charles Bonner for Jenol McLinn (Petitioner)
Nancy Rose for Allain Emelia (Objector) via CourtCall

Counsel spoke of Trust in Napa, the two assets are the house and Fidelity annuity in the amount of $225,000.00. Ms. Rose stated there is no probate able estate, the house is Trust property, the annuity is an IRA (has named beneficiary) is not subject to probate, and that Mr. Bonner suggested mediation but no dates have been set with Mr. Bonner's client. Mr. Bonner stated Fidelity will not release funds without a court order, that the IRA is in the estate, that parties have agreed to mediate, and request 60 days because his client is in the Philippines. The Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation and first amended petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Jan-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cabral Bonner for Jenol McLinn.
Nancy Rose for Allain Dion Emelia.

Ms. Rose stated that both Counsel agree to a continuance to mid January pending settlement discussion and a ruling on the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust in the Napa County matter. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to January 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
